zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Hungerford於大約1445年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼時，他的父親Sir Edmund Hungerford37歲，母親Margaret Burnell36歲。他於大約1469年與Lady Christian Halle在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1494年10月21日在英國維爾爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特聖 瑪格麗特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Hungerford于大约1445年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼时，他的父亲Sir Edmund Hungerford37岁，母亲Margaret Burnell36岁。他于大约1469年与Lady Christian Halle在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1494年10月21日在英国維爾爾享年50岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特聖 瑪格麗特。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Hungerford was born about 1445, in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir Edmund Hungerford, was 37 and his mother, Margaret Burnell, was 36. He married Lady Christian Halle about 1469, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 21 October 1494, in Wiltshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Hungerford est né environ 1445, à Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmund Hungerford, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Burnell, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Lady Christian Halle environ 1469, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 21 octobre 1494, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Hungerford um 1445 in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edmund Hungerford 37 und seine Mutter Margaret Burnell 36. Er hat um 1469 in Gloucestershire, England Lady Christian Halle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 21. Oktober 1494 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Wiltshire, England und wurde in St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Hungerford è nato il circa 1445 nel Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Edmund Hungerford, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Burnell, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Lady Christian Halle circa 1469, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 ottobre 1494, nel Wiltshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hungerfordが約1445年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダウン アンプニーで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Hungerfordは37歳，母Margaret Burnellは36歳であった。約1469年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでLady Christian Halleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1494年10月21日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで50歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタースト マーガレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hungerford(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 그루스스터실르 다운 아p니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund Hungerford(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Burnell(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1469년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Lady Christian Halle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1494년 10월 21일 영국 윌츠히르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 스트 마거릿에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Hungerford nasceu aproximadamente 1445, em Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edmund Hungerford, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Burnell, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Christian Halle aproximadamente 1469, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1494, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Hungerford родился около 1445 г. в местности доун ампни, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund Hungerford было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Burnell, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Christian Halle около 1469 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 21 октября 1494 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности ст маргарет, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Hungerford nació aproximadamente 1445, en Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edmund Hungerford, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Margaret Burnell, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Lady Christian Halle aproximadamente 1469, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1494, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
